entities.name: ZERO BUDGET NATURAL FARMING
entities.description: A farming model with no external inputs, including finance, advocated by Subhash Palekar

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where ZBNF discussions and implementation are occurring

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: Indian state where ZBNF was piloted in select blocks of 13 districts

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Staple food in Andhra Pradesh occupying 30% of the cropped area

entities.name: GHANAMRUTHAM
entities.description: A primary natural input used in ZBNF as a substitute for chemical fertilizers

entities.name: JEEVAMRUTHAM
entities.description: A liquid primary natural input used in ZBNF as a substitute for chemical fertilizers

entities.name: CHEMICAL FERTILIZERS
entities.description: External chemical inputs used in conventional farming that ZBNF seeks to replace

entities.name: COST OF PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total expense incurred by farmers to produce crops

entities.name: FARMER INCOMES
entities.description: The net earnings of farmers from agricultural activities

entities.name: SOIL HEALTH
entities.description: The condition of the soil, which ZBNF was found to partially improve

entities.name: HETEROTROPHIC MICROBIAL COMMUNITIES
entities.description: Microbes in the soil that are built up through ZBNF practices

entities.name: FLORA
entities.description: Plant life in the soil improved by ZBNF

entities.name: N FIXATION
entities.description: The process of converting atmospheric nitrogen into a usable form, improved by organic manures

entities.name: P SOLUBALIZATION
entities.description: The process of making phosphorus available to plants, improved by organic manures

entities.name: ORGANIC MANURES
entities.description: Natural fertilizers used to improve soil microbes

entities.name: COW URINE
entities.description: An ingredient in organic manures used to improve N fixation and P solubalization

entities.name: CHEMICAL-FREE FOOD
entities.description: Food produced without the use of synthetic chemicals, a goal of ZBNF

entities.name: PESTICIDE COST
entities.description: The expense associated with chemical pest control, reduced by ZBNF
